task: Optimize ESG Stage 1 (Promise Identification, Yes/No, Macro-F1): BERT classifier trained on synthetic + real data, optional low-confidence LLM-RAG fallback added in a later loop. Blind gate: beat baseline ST1 Macro-F1 on data/benchmarks/val_test.json. Runtime input = data only; promise_string allowed offline for synthesis only.
known_issues: data/benchmarks/test.json is 100% train-leaked (200/200) — RETIRED as selection split; use val_public.json (clean, disjoint from train and val_test gate).
synthetic augmentation thesis unproven: real-only ties best synthetic arm on clean val_public; gains likely from canonical-data training recipe, not synthesis.
